reason: Interactive EOD session. Karpathy protocol requires ~30 subagent CLI calls for blind A/B/C eval with first-experiment verification before unattended batches. Not appropriate to kick off from a manually-invoked session. Queued for the next automated overnight hook run to execute with human-sampled verification on the first batch.

suggestions.name: Decouple 'send Testing Approach v5' as atomic 5-min Sweep task
suggestions.rationale: 23 consecutive workdays at zero L1. v5 has PUBLISH verdict. The bottleneck is SEND, not WRITE. Creating a standalone 5-min task tagged 'just hit send — no edits, no re-reads, no additions' removes the mental overhead of 'working on the doc'. Scheduled for tomorrow AM first-thing before Core block.
suggestions.expected_impact: One-shot completion. If it still doesn't ship, the real blocker isn't friction — it's fear, perfectionism, or belief the doc isn't ready for Brandon's eyes. Either way we learn.

suggestions.name: Add 'Brandon 1:1 agenda pre-load' 15-min prep block the day before
suggestions.rationale: 2 of last 2 Brandon 1:1s have been truncated or not happened: 4/14 proper (cancelled then happened), 4/21 TRUNCATED to 4min by laptop. Without pre-loaded agenda, when the meeting degrades Richard has no fallback. A Monday-night prep block that writes the 1-line agenda to Loop doc means even a 4-min meeting hits the most important item.
suggestions.five_levels: L1 (directly serves send-the-doc cue) + L2 (manager relationship)
suggestions.expected_impact: Testing Approach send embedded in Brandon 1:1 agenda means the convo opens with it — no time for it to get bumped.

suggestions.name: EOD should force Asana delta sync before reconciliation
suggestions.rationale: Today's observability gap: 7 completions happened at 17:16-17:31 PT yesterday (4/20) but weren't captured in 4/20 EOD because the Asana sync ran earlier. EOD runs reconciliation against stale DuckDB + live Asana — the gap means tracker history has drift.
suggestions.five_levels: L3 (team automation — even if it's just for Richard's own system)
suggestions.expected_impact: Reconciliation truth matches Asana truth at the moment of EOD. Daily tracker history becomes trustworthy.

underexplored_priors_top: hands × all compression types — hands.md has zero experiments
amcc × RESTRUCTURE — underexplored, especially streak-tracking section
next_action: Next scheduled EOD hook run (automated) should execute karpathy-loop.sh with max_batches=2. If that succeeds, raise to full cadence. If it still fails unattended, investigate why — possibly CLI subagent connectivity issue post container-rebuild.
